name: GEOX
description: Earth intelligence — basin analysis, seismic interpretation, petrophysics, wells, geomechanics, subsurface modeling, claims, prospects, gravmag studio, well desk, surface status. 15 canonical MCP tools (ZEN-15 epoch 2026-07-14). EVIDENCE_ONLY.

_drift_reconcile.signature_status: STALE — body changed 2026-07-14; signature block invalidated. Re-sign required via AAA before this card is used for authority-bound operations (F11 AUDIT). Backup at agent-card.json.bak.2026-07-14.

skills.name: Well Operations
skills.description: LAS / SEG-Y / DST / deviation / tops ingest; well desk interactive view, publish, render.

tools.name: geox_well_ingest
tools.description: Load well log data from LAS, SEG-Y, DST, deviation, or tops files. Auto-detects format.

tools.name: geox_well_desk
tools.description: Well desk: interactive view, publish rendered panel, render well panel. Modes: open, publish, render.

skills.name: Petrophysics
skills.description: Vsh, ϕe, Sw, LEM inference, net pay, permeability, QC.

tools.name: geox_petrophysics
tools.description: Unified petrophysics: Vsh, porosity, Sw, permeability, net pay, LEM inference, QC. Modes: generate, verify, lem_inference, stoip_feed, qc.

skills.name: Seismic
skills.description: SEG-Y ingest, forward model, well tie, attributes, wavelet extraction, inversion, horizon/fault picking, RSI pipeline.

tools.name: geox_seismic_compute
tools.description: Seismic computation: forward model, well tie, attributes, wavelet extraction, inversion.

tools.name: geox_seismic_interpret
tools.description: Unified seismic interpretation: horizon/fault picking, RSI pipeline, vision, contrast detection.

skills.name: Basin & Stratigraphy
skills.description: Basin profiles, deep time, Macrostrat, sequence stratigraphy, biostrat parse/falsify, tectonic reconstruction.

tools.name: geox_basin
tools.description: Unified basin intelligence: profile, resolve, macrostrat, backstrip, mass balance, thermal maturity, map context, deep time, tectonic reconstruction.

tools.name: geox_sequence
tools.description: Unified stratigraphy: sequence analysis, biostratigraphic parsing and falsification.

tools.name: geox_deep_time_state
tools.description: Earth State Vector through deep time: GPTS, CO2, sea level, temperature, paleogeography.

skills.name: Geophysics & Modeling
skills.description: Geomechanics, joint inversion, gravity/magnetic forward, MT forward, gravmag studio.

tools.name: geox_geomechanics
tools.description: Geomechanical analysis: bulk/shear/young modulus, poisson ratio, acoustic impedance, stress polygon.

tools.name: geox_subsurface_model
tools.description: Subsurface model building: joint inversion, gravity/magnetic forward, MT forward.

tools.name: geox_gravmag_studio
tools.description: Gravity/magnetic studio: forward modeling and screening. Modes: open, screen.

skills.name: Governance & Judgment
skills.description: Claim lifecycle (create/validate/challenge/seal/evidence/consequence/optionality/cascade/feedback/truth), prospect evaluation, federation surface status.

tools.name: geox_claim
tools.description: Unified claim lifecycle: create, validate, challenge, seal, evidence, consequence, optionality, cascade, feedback integrity, truth challenge.

tools.name: geox_prospect
tools.description: Prospect evaluation: volumetrics, POS, EVOI, risk assessment. Modes: screen, evaluate.

tools.name: geox_surface_status
tools.description: Federation-standard registry probe: tool discovery and health status.
